attributes.title: Watcher chain
attributes.visState:
{"title": "Watcher chain", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 14, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "### Watcher chain

Run in order after config or ingest changes (skip step 0 when registry unchanged):

0. **cpm-registry-sync** — sync cluster capacity into `cpm-cluster-registry`
1. **cpm-scoring** — score clusters; writes `cpm-scores` and `cpm-cluster-scores`
2. **cpm-routing-advisor** — suggest moves or dedicated pipelines
3. **cpm-state-manager** — apply locks/suggestions; write `cpm-pipeline-state`
4. **cpm-pipeline-manager** — push Logstash pipelines

**Watcher status panels** sync from Elasticsearch `.watcher-history-*` via transform `cpm-watcher-status-sync` (~1 min after each run). Scheduled runs are logged automatically; manual runs need `record_execution`.

Manual execute (writes to history + updates dashboard):

    POST _watcher/watch/cpm-scoring/_execute
    { "record_execution": true }

Chain (in order):

    cpm-registry-sync → cpm-scoring → cpm-routing-advisor → cpm-state-manager → cpm-pipeline-manager
"}}
